_comment: Evergreen day 3 — How to read a recorded division. DIY civic literacy.
matchSubstring: You don't need a press pass to verify what your MP
text:
You don't need a press pass to verify what your MP voted on.

Every recorded division is on ourcommons.ca — yea, nay, paired, or absent, by name. Every speech in Hansard. Every bill on LEGISinfo.

10-minute skill. Lifetime access.
